summary: Verified GST Master page features and fixed SelectItem empty value error. All requested features tested: GST Master page loads without errors, GST Configuration tab shows default GST rate selector with Save button working, GST Slabs tab shows 5 pre-configured Indian GST slabs (0%, 5%, 12%, 18%, 28%), Purchase Orders page accessible from sidebar with existing invoices visible.
passed_tests: GST Master page loads without errors - SUCCESS
GST Configuration tab - Shows default GST rate selector (5%), Seller GSTIN field, Seller State selector, Save Configuration button - SUCCESS
PUT /api/gst-config saves configuration correctly (tested changing rate to 18%) - SUCCESS
GST Slabs tab - Shows 5 pre-configured Indian GST slabs (0%, 5%, 12%, 18%, 28%) - SUCCESS
GET /api/gst-slabs returns all 5 slabs with correct CGST/SGST/IGST rates - SUCCESS
Purchase Orders page accessible from sidebar - SUCCESS
Purchase Invoices page shows existing purchase invoices - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: GSTMasterPage.js SelectItem fix applied - no empty value props causing React errors
All GST slabs properly configured with CGST=SGST=total_rate/2 and IGST=total_rate
GST Configuration properly saves and retrieves from database
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing GST slabs and test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: GST Master page is fully functional. 5 pre-configured Indian GST slabs exist: 0%, 5%, 12%, 18%, 28%. GST Configuration can be saved via PUT /api/gst-config. HSN Codes tab is empty (no HSN codes configured yet). Purchase Orders page accessible at /purchases with existing invoices. SelectItem empty value fix was applied to prevent React errors.

verification_screenshots.gst_slabs_tab: Shows 5 rows: GST_0 (0%), GST_5 (5%), GST_12 (12%), GST_18 (18%), GST_28 (28%) with correct CGST/SGST/IGST breakdown
verification_screenshots.gst_config_tab: Shows Default GST Rate dropdown (currently 5%), Seller GSTIN input, Seller State selector, Save Configuration button
verification_screenshots.purchase_orders: Shows Purchase Invoices page with Total Purchases ₹105,675, 4 invoices visible

note: Main agent confirmed that heavy ML dependencies (tensorflow, deepface, keras) were removed from requirements.txt to unblock deployment. Face attendance falls back to OpenCV when DeepFace unavailable.
